pool_ID.well_ID.description: Original barcode key in the format pool_ID.well_ID (e.g. bc1015.A01).
pool_ID.well_ID.errorMessage: pool_ID.well_ID must follow <pool_ID>.<well_ID> where well_ID is a plate coordinate [A-H][0-9]{2}, e.g. bc1015.A01

sample_ID.description: User-defined sample name to assign to this well.
sample_ID.errorMessage: sample_ID must be a non-empty string with no whitespace
